Laptops

Microsoft Surface Laptop Studio 2

Microsoft Surface Laptop Studio 2 | 14.4" Touchscreen Laptop | Platinum | Windows 11 Home | 2023 Model | i7 / RAM 16GB / SSD 512GB

R 20 000

Condition: Brand New

4.0 ★★★★☆ (2)

Product Description

Surface Laptop Studio 2 is a versatile laptop for creativity and entertainment, combining cutting-edge design with incredible performance to power the most demanding apps. It can power your creativity and entertainment all day. Surface Laptop Studio 2 is designed to power the best of Microsoft’s innovation. Connect and engage better than ever before with the new wide-field of view camera with image enhancements powered by AI. Windows 11 is optimised for touch on Surface Laptop Studio 2. Tap, drag, swipe, and pinch like you do on your smartphone.

Specifications

Brand: Microsoft
Product Dimensions: 32.3 x 23 x 2.18 cm; 4.09 kg
Batteries: 6 Lithium Ion batteries required (included)
Item Model Number: YZY-00004
Colour: Platinum
Screen Size: 14.4 Inches
Screen Resolution: 1920 x 1080 pixels
Processor Brand and Type: Intel Core i7
RAM Size: 16 GB

Apple MacBook Air 2022

2022 Apple MacBook Air laptop with M2 chip: 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display, 16GB RAM, 256GB SSD storage, backlit keyboard, 1080p FaceTime HD camera.

R 12 000

Condition: Refurbished (Like New)

☆☆☆☆☆ (No Reviews)

Product Description

Powerful, portable and silent, with all-day battery life, the strikingly light and thin 13-inch MacBook Air with M2 sails through work and play. SUPERCHARGED BY M2 — With a powerful 8-core CPU and 8-core GPU, the Apple M2 chip can help you get more done faster, with power-efficient performance. BUILT FOR APPLE INTELLIGENCE — Apple Intelligence helps you write, express yourself and get things done effortlessly, with groundbreaking privacy protections. UP TO 18 HOURS OF BATTERY LIFE.
